---
title: "Lecture 5: The Wand and the Hand"
date: "2026-05-19"
order: 5
description: "A 20-slide AI literacy foundation, after Canon IX of the Bobble Canon. The wand has a power. Not the power. A power. Also available as a [written article](/the-wand-and-the-hand.html)."
categories: [presentation, bobble, bobbology, ai literacy, canon]
path: /assets/the-wand-and-the-hand.pdf
---

```{=html}
<p>Opening <a href="/assets/the-wand-and-the-hand.pdf">the slide deck (PDF)</a>… or switch to the <a href="/the-wand-and-the-hand.html">written article</a>.</p>
<script>window.location.replace("/assets/the-wand-and-the-hand.pdf");</script>
```
